style_name: Backseat Transit Doodle Letter Poster Style
summary: A realistic passenger-seat transport photo transformed into a high-energy travel poster with a central rear-view subject, electric yellow silhouette halo, oversized yellow-orange hand-drawn letters, comic rays, purple music marks, sticker icons, and cyan-white cloud swooshes.
prompt_template:
Create an image in backseat-transit-doodle-letter-poster-style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, inside or on {LOCATION}. Background details: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Style the subject with {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Use a realistic passenger-seat travel photo as the base layer: wide-angle backseat perspective, real vehicle interior, natural daylight through the windows, visible material texture, dashboard and window framing, and a believable road-trip or local transit moment.

Graphic overlay: trace the central subject with a thick electric yellow hand-drawn halo. Add oversized chunky hand-drawn letters spelling "{MAIN_TEXT}" around the subject, tilted and partly cropped by the frame. Use golden yellow fills, orange shadow shapes, burnt brown outlines, and sticker-like flat 2D finish.

Add {ACCENT_SYMBOL}, purple music marks, yellow comic speed rays from the corners, cyan-white cloud or wind swooshes along the lower frame, small sticker bubbles, and playful motion strokes. Keep the overlays bold but preserve the subject silhouette, steering gesture, and forward window view.

Text: use "{MAIN_TEXT}" as the large illustrated word. Add "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as tiny clean sticker text if it does not clutter the image. Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, app marks, copied brand logos, or copied jacket graphics.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app interface marks, copied person, copied exact vehicle, copied brand logo, copied jacket graphic, long paragraphs, crowded small text, corporate transport ad, luxury car campaign, full vector illustration, 3D chrome letters, glossy balloon type, clay render, dark horror, dystopian chase, cyberpunk city, gritty crime scene, overlays blocking the subject, overlays blocking the windshield

variables.SUBJECT: main driver, rider, guide, commuter, musician, courier, or traveler seen from behind
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: steering, tapping the horn, checking a mirror, pointing ahead, adjusting the radio, holding a map, or riding through the scene
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: portable speaker, route card, camera, map, drink can, luggage tag, helmet, hand drum, ticket, or featured travel object
variables.LOCATION: tuk-tuk cabin, pedicab, tram, minibus, ferry deck, jeepney, taxi, cable car, shuttle, or compact city transport interior
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: windshield view, side windows, textured roof, dashboard details, mirrors, small ornaments, road, market, harbor, hills, or city street outside
variables.MAIN_TEXT: short hand-drawn word such as AUTO, RIDE, GO, ZOOM, TAXI, JAM, ROLL, or DASH
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny route note, travel diary caption, date line, or small sticker label
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: yellow speed rays, purple music note, cyan cloud swoosh, orange feather icon, starburst, sticker bubble, or motion dash
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: work jacket, sun-faded shirt, utility vest, travel layers, local textile scarf, helmet, cap, or casual road-trip styling

variables.SUBJECT: an auto-rickshaw driver seen from behind
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: steering forward while adjusting a tiny radio
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a portable radio and route card
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: textured roof lining, bright windshield view, small mirrors, painted dashboard, side rails, roadside greenery, and warm cabin red details
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: purple music notes and yellow speed rays
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: olive work jacket, sun-faded collar, and casual driver styling

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 image in backseat-transit-doodle-letter-poster-style. Scene: an auto-rickshaw driver seen from behind steering forward while adjusting a tiny radio, with a portable radio and route card, inside a colorful compact tuk-tuk cabin. Include textured roof lining, bright windshield view, small mirrors, painted dashboard, side rails, roadside greenery, and warm cabin red details. Style the subject with an olive work jacket, sun-faded collar, and casual driver styling. Use a realistic passenger-seat travel photo: wide cabin framing, dashboard and window rails stretching across the image, the subject near the center, daylight visible through the windshield. Draw a thick electric yellow halo around the driver silhouette. Stretch huge hand-drawn letters spelling "AUTO" across both sides of the frame, tilted like sticker signage, with golden yellow fills, orange shadows, and burnt brown outlines. Add purple music notes and yellow speed rays, cyan-white cloud swooshes along the bottom corners, orange side icons, sticker bubbles, and playful motion strokes. Add tiny sticker text "morning route / sound on" only if clean and unobtrusive. No watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app mark, copied brand logo, or copied jacket graphic.
example_cases.prompt_9x16: Create a vertical 9:16 image in backseat-transit-doodle-letter-poster-style. Scene: an auto-rickshaw driver seen from behind steering forward while adjusting a tiny radio, with a portable radio and route card, inside a colorful compact tuk-tuk cabin. Include textured roof lining, bright windshield view, small mirrors, painted dashboard, side rails, roadside greenery, and warm cabin red details. Style the subject with an olive work jacket, sun-faded collar, and casual driver styling. Use a realistic passenger-seat travel photo: tall cabin framing, the subject centered from the back, real daylight through the windshield, visible seat vinyl and dashboard texture. Draw a thick electric yellow halo around the driver silhouette. Arrange huge hand-drawn letters spelling "AUTO" around the subject, tilted and partly cropped by the frame, with golden yellow fills, orange shadows, and burnt brown outlines. Add purple music notes and yellow speed rays, cyan-white cloud swooshes across the bottom, orange side icons, sticker bubbles, and playful motion strokes. Add tiny sticker text "morning route / sound on" only if clean and unobtrusive. No watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app mark, copied brand logo, or copied jacket graphic.

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 image in backseat-transit-doodle-letter-poster-style. Include wood bench backs, brass handrails, side windows, harbor water outside, ferry lights, route placards, and a bright coastal street ahead. Style the subject with a navy utility vest, striped shirt, cap, and transit-worker styling. Use a realistic passenger-seat travel photo with wide cabin perspective, natural daylight, visible wood and brass texture, and a clear forward view. Draw a thick electric yellow halo around the conductor. Stretch huge tilted hand-drawn letters spelling "RIDE" across left and right sides, partly cropped by the frame, with golden yellow fills, orange shadows, and burnt brown outlines. Add cyan cloud swoosh and orange feather icons, purple music marks, yellow edge speed rays, sticker bubbles, and wind strokes along the lower corners. Add tiny sticker text "harbor line / seat two" only if clean. No watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app mark, copied brand logo, or copied uniform mark.

Add tiny sticker text "harbor line / seat two" only if clean. No watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app mark, copied brand logo, or copied uniform mark.
